```py
WITH locations_h3 AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        lat,
        lon,
        h3_pointash3(
            CONCAT('POINT(', lon, ' ', lat, ')'),
            7
        ) AS h3_index
    FROM locations
),
regions_h3 AS (
    SELECT
        name,
        explode(
            h3_polyfillash3(
                wkt,
                7
            )
        ) AS h3_index
    FROM regions
)
SELECT
    l.id AS point_id,
    r.name AS region_name,
    l.lat,
    l.lon,
    r.h3_index,
    h3_boundaryaswkt(r.h3_index) AS h3_polygon_wkt  
FROM locations_h3 l
JOIN regions_h3 r
  ON l.h3_index = r.h3_index; 
```
